name: hya-hya-native-sdk
title: Wire hya frontend to hya backend via native in-process Rust SDK (no HTTP)
description: Replace hya-sdk HTTP/reqwest + SSE transport with a native in-process Rust binding: build hya_server::router(AppState) in-process, drive via tower::oneshot, bridge GlobalBus events in-process. Accept gate: hya completes a full session turn against hya with ZERO HTTP calls (no TCP listener, no reqwest).
creator: cydia2001
